prompts.name: code_review
prompts.objective: Review code for bugs, regressions, and security issues
prompts.expected_output: Bulleted findings with severity and remediation
examples: Input: PR diff, Output: 3 high-severity findings

prompts.name: rag_qa
prompts.objective: Answer from retrieved context and cite source snippets

prompts.name: summarization
prompts.objective: Summarize long technical material for engineering audience

prompts.name: sql_generator
prompts.objective: Generate safe SQL query from natural language request

prompts.name: api_analysis
prompts.objective: Analyze API payloads and recommend improvements

prompts.name: bug_investigation
prompts.objective: Investigate bug from logs and traces
